default.notes: Expanded April 2026 compatibility cluster. Track these glyphs explicitly in the repair and validation reports even when they stay on the normalize path.
Derived from the roman d donor-drift cluster. Safe only for extra-contour accent forms; integrated slash forms stay on independent review.
Derived from the roman e base. Copy the stable e contours into extra-contour accent forms before strict alignment/export checks.
Derived from the roman r donor-drift cluster. Inherit weighted fallback tracking from r.
Derived from the roman u donor-drift cluster. Safe only for extra-contour accent forms; integrated ogonek forms stay on independent review.
Derived from the repaired ss02 a base. Copy the stable a.ss02 contours into safe extra-contour accent forms before strict alignment/export checks.
Derived from aring.ss02 after the ring-bearing ss02 base has been stabilized.
Derived from the roman t base. Copy the stable t contour into the extra-contour caron form before strict alignment/export checks.

default.notes: Expanded April 2026 compatibility cluster for italic. Track these glyphs explicitly in repair and validation reports even when they stay on the normalize path.
Derived from the repaired italic g base. Copy the stable g contours into safe extra-contour accent forms before strict alignment/export checks.
Derived from the italic d base. Safe only for extra-contour accent forms; integrated slash forms stay on independent review.
Derived from the italic e base. Copy the stable e contours into extra-contour accent forms before strict alignment/export checks.
Only the heavy-end brace source is generated for the italic e derivatives that still report actual contour-order/start-point blockers in the designspace.
Derived from the italic l base. Preserve the l contour in the extra-contour dot form before strict alignment/export checks.
Derived from the italic r donor-drift cluster. Safe extra-contour derivatives inherit base contours without inheriting brace generation.
Derived from the italic u donor-drift cluster. Safe only for extra-contour accent forms; integrated ogonek forms stay on independent review.

utilde.notes: Keep the repaired u contour, but also generate in-between braces for the full utilde donor so the accent contour does not stay frozen.

default.notes: Derived from the repaired italic ae base. Copy the stable ae contours into the extra-contour acute form before strict alignment/export checks.
Derived from the italic t base. Copy the stable t contour into the extra-contour caron form before strict alignment/export checks.
